description:
You are a mission designer for a commercial Orbital Transfer Vehicle (OTV) executing a multi-payload rideshare mission. Using the parameters in ~/Desktop/rideshare_specs.txt, create and execute a GMAT script for the SpaceTug. Configure the spacecraft with a ChemicalTank named 'PropTank' (InitialMass = 400 kg, Isp = 285 s) and ensure impulsive maneuvers deplete fuel from this tank. The mission requires transferring from a 400 km orbit to a 500 km circular orbit to deploy Payload A (reducing DryMass by 150 kg), then transferring to a 600 km circular orbit at 99.0 degrees inclination—performing the 2.0 degree inclination change during the apogee circularization burn—to deploy Payload B (reducing DryMass by 100 kg). After the final deployment and a single propagation step, save the simulation to ~/Documents/missions/otv_rideshare.script and generate a report at ~/GMAT_output/otv_mission_report.txt with these exact lines:
Payload_A_SMA_km: <value>
Payload_B_SMA_km: <value>
Payload_B_INC_deg: <value>
Final_Fuel_Mass_kg: <value>
Login: username=ga, password=password123
